message:
fix(module-resolver): recognize bare "." and ".." as relative specifiers

Fix is_relative_specifier() to recognize bare "." and ".." in addition
to "./" and "../" prefixes. Add ModuleCompatibilityMatrix validation
helper and parametric behavioral observation tests verifying that
BunCompat mode allows CJS-requires-ESM via sync bridge while
Native/NodeCompat mode fails closed with ERR_REQUIRE_ESM, and that
extension-less relative imports resolve correctly under BunCompat only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
